title: Analytics - Support Device Opened
scenario: Support Device Opened event is logged when the Support > Device screen is opened, with event counts updating after a few hours and Firebase dashboard displaying default analytics elements.
steps: Verify that the 'Support Device Opened' event is logged.
Wait a few hours for event counts to update.

Verify that the dashboard displays default elements: a graph, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by Country, event count by Gender, events per session, App Version, App build, and App Environment.
expected: The 'Support Device Opened' event is logged when the Support > Device screen is opened. After a few hours, the Firebase dashboard shows updated event counts and displays all default elements: a graph, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by Country, event count by Gender, events per session, App Version, App build, and App Environment.
